title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Periodontal Disease
description: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils contains camphor, borneol, and bornyl acetate as its primary bioactive constituents. These compounds exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that help combat periodontal disease. Camphor's antiseptic properties reduce the growth of bacteria that cause infections in the gums and teeth, while borneol and bornyl acetate reduce inflammation and ease pain. The anti-inflammatory properties of Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils also help...
